name: my-raycast-ext
title: Personal Tools
description: Personal Raycast commands for local automation.
author: zhi

commands.name: caffeinate
commands.title: Caffeinate
commands.description: Keep the Mac awake while the menu bar item is visible.

commands.name: adjust-display-brightness
commands.title: Adjust Display Brightness
commands.description: Set external display brightness with m1ddc.

commands.name: create-empty-docs
commands.title: Create Empty Docs
commands.description: Create an empty Lark document and open it.
